title: Power conversion device
abstract: A power conversion unit is disclosed. The power conversion unit comprises a capacitive bus bar and at least one DC-DC converter having an output capacitance and being electrically coupled to the capacitive bus bar. The output capacitance comprises a component due to the capacitive bus bar.
claims: Claims 1. A power conversion unit comprising: a capacitive bus bar; and at least one DC-DC converter having an output capacitance and being electrically coupled to the capacitive bus bar, wherein the output capacitance comprises a component due to the capacitive bus bar, the component due to the capacitive bus bar is at least 20% of the output capacitance. 2. A power conversion unit according to claim 1, wherein the component due to the capacitive bus bar is at least 50% of the output capacitance. 3. A power conversion unit according to claim 1, wherein the component due to the capacitive bus bar is at least 80% of the output capacitance. 4. A power conversion unit according to any preceding claim, wherein each of the at least one DC-DC converters is configured to receive an input current from a respective input power source. 5. A power conversion unit according to claim 4, wherein at least one respective input power source comprises a photovoltaic module. 6. A power conversion unit according to any preceding claim, wherein the capacitive bus bar comprises a laminated structure comprising at least two conductive layers spaced apart by at least one insulating layer. 7. A power conversion unit according to any preceding claim, further comprising a bus bar converter configured to stabilize a voltage at terminals of the capacitive bus bar. 8. A power conversion unit according to any preceding claim, the power conversion unit further comprising a thermal pad between the at least one DC-DC converter and the capacitive bus bar. 9. A photovoltaic unit comprising a power conversion unit according to any preceding claim, and at least one photovoltaic cell. 10. A photovoltaic unit according to claim 9 which is a building-integrated photovoltaic unit. 11. A power conversion apparatus comprising a first power conversion unit according to claim 1 and a second power conversion unit according to claim 1, wherein the capacitive bus bar of the first power conversion unit is electrically coupled to the capacitive bus bar of the second power conversion unit to form a composite capacitive bus bar. 12. A power conversion apparatus according to claim 11, wherein the composite capacitive bus bar is electrically coupled to a low-voltage direct current grid.
